case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. HAROLDO ELIU CHAVEZ LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, HAROLDO ELIU CHAVEZ $2,431.91 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,531.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED SEP-29-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, HAROLDO ELIU CHAVEZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/31/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FORWARD TIME EXP - RTN TO SEND".
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,431.91 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, HAROLDO ELIU CHAVEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT HAROLODO ELIU CHAVEZ LOPEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
